refactor_tasks.title: Clean up examples/ directory
refactor_tasks.action: Run git rm -r examples/ to remove the leftover directory and __pycache__ files. Add **/__pycache__/ to .gitignore if not already covered.

refactor_tasks.title: Fix BUNDLED_RUNTIME_DIR to use dirname(process.execPath) for compiled binary
refactor_tasks.action: Replace BUNDLED_RUNTIME_DIR constant with a guard: use import.meta.dir when running under the Bun interpreter (dev), and dirname(process.execPath) when running as a compiled binary (prod). Suggested: const BUNDLED_RUNTIME_DIR = Bun.argv[0].endsWith('bun') ? join(import.meta.dir, '../../runtime') : join(dirname(process.execPath), 'runtime');

refactor_tasks.title: Fix Spanish outro string to English
refactor_tasks.action: Change outro("Listo. Ejecuta: parallax create image --help") to outro("Done. Run: parallax create image --help").
